title: Combretocarpus rotundatus
taxonomy: Combretocarpus rotundatus belongs to the family Sapindaceae and is a species of flowering plant. It is native to the tropical regions of Asia. The classification of Combretocarpus rotundatus is a part of the order Sapindales and is a member of the genus Combretocarpus. The plant is also sometimes referred to as a member of the Combretocarpaceae family, which is a former family that has been merged into Sapindaceae. Its exact classification may vary depending on the source and current taxonomic understanding.
